entry.cap:headline: TEST SEVERE THUNDERSTORM WARNING TEST
entry.cap:description:
THIS IS A TEST MESSAGE. TEST TEST.
At 12:00 PM CDT, a TEST severe thunderstorm was located near Haubstadt, Indiana. This alert exists ONLY for TESTING purposes.
TEST TEST TEST — NO REAL WEATHER THREAT — TEST TEST TEST.
entry.cap:instruction: TEST INSTRUCTION: This is only a TEST of the weather alert display system. Take no action. TEST TEST TEST.
